prompt: Remove NFS-006, 'Support for Windows Server 2012', as it's end-of-life. What impact does this have on our current deployment environments? And modify FS-016, 'User Profile Management', to include an option for users to delete their entire account.

expected.clarifyRequirement: clarify the impact of removing NFS-006 on current deployment environments.
expected.modifyRequirement: modify FS-016, 'User Profile Management', to include an option for users to delete their entire account.
